headline: Why Halliburton (HAL) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of oilfield services company Halliburton (NYSE:HAL) jumped 3.3% in the afternoon session after the stock continued to rally as the company posted better-than-expected first-quarter 2026 financial results, which prompted an analyst upgrade.
